title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Nia discovers that her feelings come in different colors - from angry red to happy yellow to sad blue. Through her day, she learns that all feelings are okay and colorful.

pages.text: This is Nia. Nia has big feelings. Her feelings are colorful!

illustration.description: A cheerful girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing in the center surrounded by swirling colors representing different emotions - red angry swirls, blue sad droplets, yellow happy sunshine rays
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is angry, she sees red. Red like fire. Red like hot soup. Mad feelings are red!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with crossed arms and a frown, surrounded by intense red swirls and angular red shapes creating an abstract angry emotion background
illustration.alt: Angry Nia surrounded by red swirls

pages.text: When Nia is sad, she sees blue. Blue like rain. Blue like tears. Sad feelings are blue.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking downcast with blue raindrops falling around her against a blue abstract background with flowing sad blue patterns
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain around her

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she sees yellow! Yellow like the sun. Yellow like flowers. Happy feelings are bright yellow!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes smiling widely with arms raised up, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and cheerful yellow abstract shapes creating a joyful emotion background
illustration.alt: Happy Nia surrounded by yellow sunshine

pages.text: Red feelings. Blue feelings. Yellow feelings. All of Nia's feelings are okay. All feelings have colors!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes in the center with a peaceful expression, surrounded by a beautiful blend of red swirls, blue rain droplets, and yellow sunshine creating a harmonious rainbow of emotion colors
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by all her colorful feelings together

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color are Nia's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: When Nia is angry, she sees red like fire and hot soup!

questions.question: What color are Nia's sad feelings?
questions.explanation: When Nia is sad, she sees blue like rain and tears!

questions.question: Are all of Nia's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All of Nia's feelings are okay. Red, blue, and yellow feelings are all normal!
